message:
feat(random): align RNG bounded-integer and distribution algorithms with NumPy

Rewrite the bounded-integer core to match NumPy's exact implementations:
add next_uint32() with u32 buffering, bounded_lemire_uint32/uint64(),
numpy_bounded_uint64() with auto 32/64 dispatch, and random_interval()
for masked rejection matching _shuffle_raw.

Fix gamma distribution for shape < 1.0 to use NumPy's exact rejection
algorithm instead of the gamma(a+1)*U^(1/a) shortcut. Add 9 new oracle
tests (poisson, f, t, vonmises, negative_binomial, noncentral_chisquare,
noncentral_f, multivariate_normal, dirichlet) verified against NumPy.
Document 4 known parity gaps as ignored tests (binomial BTPE, zipf,
hypergeometric H2PE, multinomial).

Update conformance expected values for f_distribution, noncentral_chisquare,
and noncentral_f to match corrected RNG output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
